final:
module top_module(
  input A,
  input B,
  output SUM,
  output CARRY,
  input VPWR,
  input VGND,
  input VPB,
  input VNB
);// Define the behavioral implementation of a half adder
  assign SUM = A ^ B;      // Sum is A XOR B
  wire temp1_A = A;
  wire temp2_B = B;
  assign CARRY = temp1_A & temp2_B;    // Carry is A AND B

endmodule
